nasb.text: These are springs without water and mists driven by a storm, for whom the black darkness has been reserved.

esv.text: These are waterless springs and mists driven by a storm. For them the gloom of utter darkness has been reserved.

cnv.text: 這些人是無水的泉源，是暴風催逼的霧氣，有漆黑的幽暗為他們存留。

ccb.text: 他们如同枯干的水井和被狂风吹散的雾气，有幽幽黑暗留给他们。

csbs.text: 这些人是无水的泉源，是被暴风吹逐的云雾；有漆黑的幽暗为他们存留。
